drafts.text:
Q2 closes today.

75 days. 30 releases. 242 downloads. $0 raised. 1 builder.

I shipped Jot — free, on-device Mac dictation — from zero with no funding, no App Store, no press. Press a hotkey, speak, text at your cursor. On the Neural Engine. Nothing leaves your Mac.

How did your Q2 ship?

#macOS #indiedev #buildinpublic
drafts.note: Attach q2-builder-stats.svg (export as 1080×1080 PNG). Link in FIRST COMMENT — not post body. Monday + last day of Q2 is strongest moment in campaign — post at 7am PT.

drafts.text:
Q2 is done: 75 days, 30 releases, 242 downloads building a free on-device Mac dictation app (I built it)

Today is the last day of Q2 2026. Here's what happened:

75 days since v1.0 launched (April 16). 30 releases — roughly one every 2.5 days. 242 downloads. $0 raised. 1 builder.

Jot is free, open-source Mac dictation that transcribes entirely on-device on the Apple Neural Engine. Press a hotkey, speak, and the text lands wherever your cursor is — Slack, email, your IDE, anywhere. No window-switching. No cloud. No subscription. Nothing leaves your Mac.

I shipped it with no funding, no App Store listing, no press coverage. Just direct downloads and word of mouth.

What went into 30 releases: AI rewrite with voice instruction, 11-language support, custom vocabulary with acoustic rescoring, Apple Intelligence as the default AI provider on macOS 26, Ask Jot in-app chatbot, Sparkle auto-update, Sony flavor (corporate distribution).

Next quarter: I'm opening it to the App Store and focusing on reducing the setup friction for non-technical users.

If you've tried it — I'd love to know what you think. Disclosure: I built this.

Link in comments.
drafts.note: Post to r/macapps. recommended:false — last true June 27 (3 days ago); earliest July 1. SUGGESTION: Hold for July 1 and reframe as 'Q2 wrapped up yesterday'.

notes: Total downloads 242 (+2 from June 29's 240; avg7=5/day). Today is last day of Q2 2026 — 75 days since v1.0 April 16. iTunes API 403 (18th consecutive day); appstore.json date updated, values preserved. Outreach window opens July 1 — priority: machow2.com, speakmac.app, Resonant, BuildBetter AI. Reddit recommended:false (earliest July 1 — hold Q2 post for then). Instagram recommended:false (earliest July 2). New competitor: FreeFlow (github.com/zachlatta/freeflow) appeared in searches for first time. Jot absent from all roundups.
